docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT AS TO DEFENDANT RADIGAN, JOHN J JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
